name: ScrollbarDirective
description:
The scrollbar directive.

Children usage:
```html
<div fd-scrollbar>
<div fd-scrollbar noVerticalScroll>
<div fd-scrollbar [noVerticalScroll]="true">
<div fd-scrollbar noHorizontalScroll>
<div fd-scrollbar [noHorizontalScroll]="true">
```

inputs.name: alwaysVisible
inputs.description: Whether scrollbars should be visible even if content fits.

inputs.name: noHorizontalScroll
inputs.description: Whether overflow horizontal content should be hidden.

inputs.name: noVerticalScroll
inputs.description: Whether overflow vertical content should be hidden.
